required_preferences.fact: Prioritizes iron-rich plant-based meals (e.g., lentils, tofu, spinach); now occasionally includes carefully selected vegetarian options (such as eggs or dairy) to meet iron needs, regardless of full vegan status.

supersedes.fact: Only cooks plant-based meals at home; avoids eating out unless vegan options are guaranteed

required_preferences.fact: Co-leads weekly in-person team meetings for project collaboration, supplementing video calls as needed; no longer avoids face-to-face group discussions

supersedes.fact: Collaborates only through scheduled video calls — avoids long email threads for project discussions

required_preferences.fact: Records her lab section lectures for undergrads, but never reuses past material; updates slides every quarter
Uses her prescribed inhaler daily, integrates medication reminders into her health app routine; never skips inhaler use while pollen levels are elevated
Adds daily reminders for iron supplement intake in her German health app; never skips or delays the supplement routine.
Keeps an air purifier running in her apartment — never opens windows during high-pollen days

persona: An international PhD candidate in environmental science
